mission.title: Install and Configure Bpfman on Kubernetes
mission.description: bpfman is an eBPF Manager designed to simplify the deployment and management of eBPF programs in Kubernetes environments. Installing bpfman allows you to gain insights into eBPF utilization and manage eBPF programs effectively.

steps.title: Install bpfman operator via release manifests
steps.description:
Deploy the bpfman operator from the official release:
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://github.com/bpfman/bpfman-operator/releases/download/v0.5.4/install.yaml
```

steps.title: Verify the operator is running
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n bpfman
kubectl get crd | grep bpfman
```

steps.title: Deploy a BPF program
steps.description:
Create a BpfProgram custom resource:
```bash
kubectl apply -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: bpfman.io/v1alpha1
kind: XdpProgram
metadata:
  name: xdp-pass
spec:
  bpfFunctionName: pass
  bytecode:
    image:
      url: quay.io/bpfman-bytecode/xdp_pass:latest
  interfaceSelector:
    primaryNodeInterface: true
EOF
```

steps.title: Check BPF program status
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get xdpprograms
kubectl describe xdpprogram xdp-pass
```

troubleshooting.title: Operator pods failing
troubleshooting.description:
bpfman requires Linux kernel 5.18+ with BTF:
```bash
uname -r
ls /sys/kernel/btf/vmlinux
```

troubleshooting.title: CRDs not found
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
kubectl get crd | grep bpfman
```
Reinstall the operator if CRDs are missing.

resolution.summary: bpfman operator is installed for managing BPF programs on Kubernetes nodes.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running and kubectl configured to interact with it.
